race.description: Katrina Beohm Real Estate Mdn Plate
race.comment: POETIC ANGEL (9) finished third last start at the first run back from a spell over 1100m at Grafton, beaten 3 lengths. This is the right race and can take this out. MUSUMECI (3) turned in a decent effort last start to finish third over 1111m at Murwillumbah. Steps up a level but he is good enough to figure in the finish. LUCKY ME (7) finished fourth last start over 1010m at Ballina, an improvement on her sixth at Nowra the run before. Suitably placed so anticipating a big run this time. ROWDIE BLUE (10) is a mare by Barood out of Peaceandhappiness on debut. Well educated with two trials. Worth watching for a betting move.
